Our Products

The HANATEX
Product Family

Engineered for consistency and performance, each HANATEX product meets the exacting requirements of modern textile printing. SDS and TDS documentation available upon request.

For Polyester
HANATEX SW-8

High-viscosity synthetic thickener for disperse dye printing on polyester. Excellent rheology and clean washout.

Request TDS →
For Polyester
HANATEX DH-P

Designed for screen and digital combined printing. Sharp definition on polyester substrates.

Request TDS →
Polyester · Rotary
HANATEX R-80

Optimized for rotary screen printing. Stable viscosity across temperature ranges for continuous production.

Request TDS →
For Cotton & Rayon
HANATEX DH-C

Reactive dye thickener for cotton and rayon. Superior color yield and uniform dye penetration.

Request TDS →
For Cotton & Rayon
HANATEX CLX A & C

Urea-free reactive thickener system. Eco-conscious formulation — no compromise on performance.

Request TDS →
For Cotton & Rayon
HANATEX CLXi

Enhanced CLX for improved paste stability and printability on cellulosic fibers.

Request TDS →
Denim Discharge
HANATEX DDA

Color discharge agent for denim. Sharp, consistent bleach effects with predictable tone. (Export: HANATEX 750)

Request TDS →
Denim Discharge
HANATEX CS-400

White discharge agent for denim finishing. Clean, bright white effects in garment processing.

Request TDS →
Forming Binder
HANATEX HFB

High-performance forming binder for pigment printing. Excellent washfastness and fabric hand.

Request TDS →

How We Make It

Automated Manufacturing
Process

From raw material intake to export dispatch — every step in HANATEX production is controlled, documented, and quality-verified. 9 integrated stages including our proprietary reaction technology.

PHASE 1 · Intake & Preparation
01STEP
Raw Material Receiving
Container Unloading · Inspection
Container unloadingPallet storageRandom sampling & lab testingIncoming log recorded
Container Unloading · Inspection
02STEP
Material Transport
Forklift · Auto Weight Check
Forklift transfer to work station500 KG auto-weight verificationRFID tracking
Forklift · Auto Weight Check
PHASE 2 · Production
⚡ AUTO
03STEP
Raw Material Feeding
4-Silo Auto Dosing · PLC
Auto dosing from Main #1 · #2 · #3 silosSub #1 additive feedPLC-controlled screw conveyor
4-Silo Auto Dosing · PLC
⚿ PROPRIETARY
04STEP
Reaction Stage
Jacketed Reactor · DCS Controlled
Chemical reaction between raw materialsTemp · pressure · agitation auto-controlledProprietary conditions per product
Jacketed Reactor · Proprietary
⚡ AUTO
05STEP
Blending
Auto Ribbon Blender · 30 min
Ribbon blender 30-min mixingLOT number auto-recordedUniformity monitoring
Auto Ribbon Blender · 30 min
PHASE 3 · Discharge & Packaging
⚡ AUTO
06STEP
Discharge → Fill · Sew · Label
Integrated Auto Packaging Line
Auto discharge → conveyorAuto-weigh fillAuto bag sewingLOT label auto-applied
Discharge → Fill · Sew · Label
⚡ AUTO
07STEP
Robot Palletizing
6-Axis Robot · 500 KG / Pallet
6-axis robot arm auto-stacking500 KG per pallet (20 bags)Auto stretch-wrap
6-Axis Robot Palletizer
PHASE 4 · QC & Dispatch
08STEP
Quality Control
Physical Properties & Print Testing
Viscosity · pH · Density · Rheology on pasteHand print → Steamer → Wash → Mini stenterDye compatibility verified
Physical & Print QC Lab
09STEP
Product Dispatch
Loading Dock · Container Export
Forklift container loadingFinal wrap inspectionShipping documentsExport dispatch
Loading Dock · Export Dispatch

Business Expansion

Growing into
new industries

Building on 40+ years of specialty chemical expertise, DOHO is actively diversifying into high-growth advanced industries.

⚡
EV Battery · CMC OEM
Active Development

High-purity Carboxymethyl Cellulose (CMC) for lithium-ion battery anode binders, sourced via OEM from specialist overseas manufacturers.

Target: LG Energy Solution · Samsung SDI · SK On
⚙️
Nickel Screen OEM
Currently Supplying

Precision rotary nickel screens for suction roll reinforcement and industrial film production. OEM via China & India with zero-defect surface standards.

메쉬 135
표면 Zero-defect

Supply: China OEM (active) · India OEM (in progress)
🌿
Slope Seed-Spray · Civil Engineering
Prototype Completed

Proprietary thickener technology applied to slope revegetation. Enhanced adhesion and lower cost vs. conventional solutions. Prototype tested at golf course slopes.

Key Advantage
Enhanced adhesion · Lower material cost
Target Projects
SOC Highways · National Roads · Landslide Prevention
🔄
Digital Textile & Overseas Export
Market Expansion

K-textile technology transfer and digital printing auxiliaries. Active in Indonesia since 2014, expanding to Vietnam and India.

Markets
Indonesia · Vietnam · India
